name: team_task_add_context
description: Add a new context source to an existing task. Context sources provide external references and background information from integrations like GitHub, Slack, Jira, or custom data. Use this to enrich a task with additional information discovered during planning or execution.

task_id.description: Unique identifier of the task to add context to

context_type.description: Type of context source being added

context_data.description: Source-specific data payload containing references, content, or configuration

examples.name: Add GitHub issue context to a task

context_data.title: Login fails with expired refresh token

examples.name: Add Slack conversation context to a task

context_data.summary: Team discussion about auth flow requirements
